-- This is auto-generated code
with racePopulationCTE as
(SELECT
    race,
    sum(population) as racePopulation
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK     'https://azureopendatastorage.blob.core.windows.net/censusdatacontainer/release/us_population_zip/year=*/*.parquet',
        FORMAT = 'parquet'
    )
    AS [result]
    Group by Race
    )

/*SELECT
top 10 *
from racePopulationCTE*/



SELECT
race, 
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY racePopulation DESC) AS PopulationRank,
racePopulation

from racePopulationCTE
